title: A letter inquiring about the capture of strange beings in Varginha-MG [1996]
excerpt: Correspondence sent by the Ufological Group of Guarujá, State of São Paulo, to the commander of COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], on April 24, 1996, by the Group’s president, Mr. Edison Boaventura Júnior, “inquiring about the case of the capture of strange creatures in Varginha, State of Minas Gerais. “TO CONDABRA A/C COMMANDER São Paulo-SP […]
text_preview:
Correspondence sent by the Ufological Group of Guarujá, State of São Paulo, to the commander of COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], on April 24, 1996, by the Group’s president, Mr. Edison Boaventura Júnior, “inquiring about the case of the capture of strange creatures in Varginha, State of Minas Gerais.

“TO CONDABRA

A/C COMMANDER

São Paulo-SP

On June 1st, 1995, we took the initiative to write a letter of n. 95/113 (the copy of which is attached), but we have not received a written response to what we would like this Command to provide.

On the other hand, we started an excellen
summary: April 1996 letter from the Ufological Group of Guarujá to COMDABRA requesting official clarification on the alleged capture of strange creatures in Varginha MG.
